name: Dario Health Digital Therapeutics API
what_it_does: Dario Health digital therapeutics REST API for health plans, employers, and health systems to deliver AI-powered chronic disease management for diabetes, hypertension, musculoskeletal conditions, and behavioral health. Enables AI agents to manage member enrollment and onboarding for digital therapeutics program automation, handle blood glucose monitoring data integration for diabetes management automation, access real-time biometric data from Dario smart devices for RPM automation, retrieve personalized coaching session scheduling and delivery for chronic disease engagement automation, manage condition-specific intervention pathway assignment for digital therapeutics protocol automation, handle claims and utilization data integration for health plan population health automation, access behavioral health check-in and mood tracking for mental health digital therapeutics automation, retrieve A1C and lab value integration for longitudinal diabetes outcomes automation, manage employer wellness program enrollment and engagement for workforce health automation, and integrate Dario with health plan claims systems, EHRs, and benefits platforms for end-to-end chronic disease program management.
use_cases: Managing diabetes members from chronic disease automation agents
Tracking biometrics from RPM digital therapeutics agents
Enrolling employees from employer wellness automation agents
Reporting clinical outcomes from health plan population health agents
not_for: FDA Class II/III medical device data (use clinical-grade device APIs)
Research-grade clinical trial data collection (use Medidata or Veeva)
best_when: A health plan, employer, or health system wanting AI agents to automate chronic disease digital therapeutics delivery, biometric monitoring, personalized coaching engagement, and population health reporting within Dario's DTx platform.
avoid_when: FDA SOFTWARE AS MEDICAL DEVICE FOR DIABETES MANAGEMENT: Dario Health's AI-powered diabetes coaching features may constitute Software as a Medical Device (SaMD); automated clinical recommendations based on Dario glucose data that suggest medication adjustment without physician oversight creates FDA SaMD classification risk. HIPAA MINIMUM NECESSARY FOR CHRONIC DISEASE PHI: Automated access to Dario member biometric, behavioral health, and chronic disease data constitutes sensitive PHI categories; automated data pipelines must implement minimum necessary standard; behavioral health data accessed via Dario integration requires heightened protection under state mental health parity laws. ADA/AADE CLINICAL GUIDELINE AUTOMATION RISK: Automated diabetes coaching via Dario that contradicts current ADA Standards of Medical Care creates clinical liability exposure; ensure automated coaching protocols are reviewed against current ADA guidelines before deployment.

auth.notes: Dario Health uses OAuth 2.0 with scopes. REST API with JSON and mobile SDKs for patient-facing apps. New York HQ. Founded 2011 as LabStyle Innovations, rebranded to DarioHealth in 2015. Public (NASDAQ: DRIO). Digital therapeutics for diabetes, hypertension, musculoskeletal, and behavioral health. Smart glucometer device + app platform. Health plan and employer channel partnerships. FHIR output for EHR integration. HIPAA Business Associate. Competes with Omada Health, Livongo (now Teladoc Health), and Noom for digital chronic disease management.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-member per-month subscription for health plan and employer programs
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-member monthly subscription for health plans and employers; device + coaching bundle pricing; API access for enterprise health plan integrations
pricing.notes: New York NY. Public (NASDAQ: DRIO). Per-member monthly subscription. Health plan and employer channel. Device + DTx bundle. No free tier.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; biometric and member queries throttled; webhooks for device sync and coaching events

known_agent_gotchas: GLUCOMETER DEVICE PAIRING ACTIVATION REQUIREMENT: Dario smart glucometer requires physical device activation before member biometric data flows via API; automated member enrollment via Dario API creates member record but does not activate device data stream; device kit shipment and physical activation is prerequisite for automated biometric data collection; automated RPM workflows must verify device activation status before expecting glucose readings

BEHAVIORAL HEALTH DATA STATE LAW LAYERING: Dario behavioral health module data involves mental health and substance use data; state mental health confidentiality laws (e.g., California Welfare and Institutions Code 5328, New York Mental Hygiene Law) impose additional restrictions beyond HIPAA; automated data sharing of behavioral health component data to third-party systems must verify state-specific consent requirements beyond the Dario HIPAA BAA

HEALTH PLAN ELIGIBILITY SYNC LAG: Dario member eligibility for health plan programs is driven by eligibility file feeds from health plans; automated coaching session scheduling or biometric alert triggering for terminated members creates engagement with ineligible members; implement eligibility status check in automated workflows with tolerance for 24-48 hour eligibility file lag

DUAL CONDITION OVERLAP IN DTx PATHWAY ASSIGNMENT: Dario supports multiple chronic conditions per member; automated pathway assignment for members with comorbid diabetes and hypertension must handle dual enrollment; automated single-pathway assignment for multi-condition members misses condition-specific intervention opportunities available through Dario's comorbidity management capabilities

NASDAQ DRIO SMALL CAP PLATFORM RISK: Dario Health is a small-cap public company (NASDAQ: DRIO); financial stability and platform investment capacity is more constrained than large health plan vendors; evaluate platform sustainability for long-term automated workflow dependency before building complex enterprise integrations on Dario
agent_readiness.security_notes: Digital therapeutics. HIPAA, SOC2, FDA-registered device. OAuth2. US. Member biometric, chronic disease, and behavioral health data.

security_score_components.security_notes: DTx platform. HIPAA, SOC2, FDA-registered. OAuth2. US. Biometric, chronic disease, and behavioral health PHI.
